message:
perf(parser): retain identifier interns across scratch parses

Keep parser scratch identifier interns alive across repeated parses, but reset them when the retained set grows beyond fixed entry or byte caps.

Microbench (parse_statements_with_scratch, 200000 iters): 876.6 ms mean -> 764.2 ms mean (+14.8%).

Post-fix perf: next >5% parser symbol is Parser::parse_expr_bp_inner at 7.23%.
